brand.name: The Vanilla Bean
brand.heroSubtitle: From celebration cakes to coffee breaks, The Vanilla Bean brings premium bakes, custom cake artistry, and warm cafe energy into every order.
brand.description: A modern neighborhood bakery and cafe serving handcrafted cakes, pastries, cookies, coffee, and quick savory bites for daily cravings and milestone celebrations.
brand.location: A/7, Abanindranath Bithi, City Centre, Durgapur, West Bengal
brand.deliveryNote: Same-day delivery is available on selected cakes and cafe favorites across Durgapur.

stats.label: Open daily for dine-in and takeaway
Photo cakes, party cakes, event cakes

signatureExperiences.title: Custom cake builder
signatureExperiences.copy: Choose size, flavor, cream, toppings, image reference, and message, then save the design before checkout.

signatureExperiences.title: Celebration ordering
signatureExperiences.copy: Fast ordering for birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, and office milestones with delivery or pickup.

signatureExperiences.title: Customer dashboard

reputation.headline: Celebration-first menu
reputation.detail: From party cakes to casual coffee meetups, the menu is built around both events and everyday indulgence.

reputation.headline: Neighborhood cafe warmth
reputation.detail: A bright, cozy dine-in space, welcoming counter service, and a premium-yet-friendly bakery vibe.

reputation.headline: Quick local convenience
reputation.detail: Popular categories like cakes, pastries, cold coffee, mocktails, pizza, and puff pastries are all in one place.

reviews.title: Photo cake matched the brief perfectly
reviews.body: I uploaded a reference image, added a short message, and the final cake looked polished, fresh, and exactly like the mood board.
reviews.name: Arya D.

reviews.title: Smooth ordering and elegant finish
reviews.body: The checkout was simple, the anniversary cake styling felt premium, and the delivery arrived inside the chosen slot.
reviews.name: Mitali R.

reviews.title: Cold coffee and pastries always hit
reviews.body: The cafe menu is easy to browse and the reorder option makes quick snack runs much easier for repeat visits.
reviews.name: Aditya S.

reviews.title: Bulk dessert table felt organized
reviews.body: We used the site for an office celebration and the team loved the mix of custom cake, pastries, cookies, and coffee add-ons.
reviews.name: Pooja K.

reviews.title: Saved design feature was actually useful
reviews.body: We tried two custom cake versions, saved both, and finalized the wedding design later without re-entering every detail.
reviews.name: Rhea L.

reviews.title: Clear status updates helped a lot
reviews.body: The tracking and dashboard view made it easy to follow the request and the admin team updated the order stages clearly.
reviews.name: Kunal B.

process.title: Choose your celebration
process.copy: Birthday, anniversary, wedding, gifting, office event, or a cafe snack run.

process.title: Build the design
process.copy: Select a ready bestseller or customize shape, layers, filling, frosting color, toppings, and a photo reference.

process.title: Checkout with offers
process.copy: Apply coupons, pick a payment method, save your address, and confirm delivery or pickup.

process.title: Track and reorder
process.copy: Receive a tracking ID instantly, follow status changes, and revisit the same order from the dashboard.

faqs.question: Can I save a custom design before ordering?
faqs.answer: Yes. The upgraded builder lets customers save a design to the dashboard with options, notes, and a reference image preview.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day delivery?
faqs.answer: Selected ready cakes and cafe items can be delivered the same day, depending on slot availability and your location.

faqs.question: How do coupons and loyalty work?
faqs.answer: Checkout supports coupon codes and Vanilla Circle members earn loyalty points after each order. Dashboard shows active tier, referral code, and saved perks.

faqs.question: Can I reorder an earlier custom cake?
faqs.answer: Yes. Dashboard history includes reorder links for past orders and saved designs.

offers.headline: Launch Week Offer: 20% Off On Your First Celebration Order
offers.subline: Use code SWEET20 for selected cake orders. Countdown resets for the demo build every time you reopen the site.

blog.title: How To Choose The Right Cake For Every Celebration
blog.excerpt: A quick flavor, size, and styling guide for birthdays, anniversaries, and surprise gifting.
blog.author: Team Vanilla Bean

sections.heading: Start with the guest list
body: Guest count should shape your weight choice before anything else. A beautiful finish matters, but the cake still needs to feed the room comfortably.
For smaller family dinners, 0.5 kg or 1 kg cakes often feel balanced. Larger parties and office groups usually need 1.5 kg and above.

sections.heading: Match the mood, not just the flavor
body: Vanilla and butterscotch work well when you want a safer crowd-pleaser. Truffle, red velvet, and blueberry feel stronger for premium or romantic celebrations.
Minimal styling fits intimate dinners, while bright colors, toppers, and photo prints work better for birthdays and surprise parties.

sections.heading: Use saved designs to compare options
body: The upgraded custom cake builder lets customers save multiple versions before checkout. That is useful when a family wants to compare themes, messages, and frostings before confirming one order.

tips: Keep one safe flavor for mixed-age groups.
Use a saved design if you are still deciding.

blog.title: Cafe Pairings: What To Order With Cold Coffee
blog.excerpt: From cheese sandwiches to puff pastries, here are the best snack combinations for quick meetups.
blog.author: The Counter Team

sections.heading: For casual catch-ups
body: Classic cold coffee pairs naturally with fries, chilli cheese toast, and puffs because the salty bites balance the sweeter drink profile.
If the hangout is longer, a sandwich adds more structure without making the table feel too heavy.

sections.heading: For dessert-led cafe stops
body: Nutella cold coffee and biscoff cheesecake create a rich, indulgent combo for guests who want a dessert-first experience.
For a lighter finish, pair cold coffee with a fruit pastry or packaged cookies to take home.

tips: Classic cold coffee pairs best with savory bites.
Nutella and biscoff options work better with dessert pairings.

blog.title: Dessert Counter Favorites To Take Home
blog.excerpt: Cookies, muffins, cheesecakes, and pastries that travel beautifully for gifting and late-night cravings.
blog.author: Bakery Team

sections.heading: Best travel-friendly picks
body: Cookies, brownies, muffins, and cheesecakes are the easiest dessert counter picks to carry for office gifting or home dessert tables.
These products travel better than plated cafe items and still keep the premium Vanilla Bean presentation.

sections.heading: Gift-worthy combos
body: A cookie tub, muffin box, and one premium pastry slice can turn into a polished mini gifting set for birthdays, thank-you gestures, and quick festive visits.

tips: Use dessert bundles for quick gifting.
